## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Related issue or RFC

Link the issue or RFC. Protocol-affecting changes require prior discussion.

## Change type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature or behavior change
- [ ] Specification, schema, or registry change
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] Tests, documentation, or maintenance

## Validation

- [ ] I ran `make validate`.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavioral changes.
- [ ] I updated documentation and implementation status where needed.
- [ ] I preserved locked dependency resolution.
- [ ] My commits are signed.
- [ ] The change contains no secrets, production keys, or personal data.

## Security and compatibility impact

Explain changes to trust boundaries, cryptography, key lifecycle, recovery,
transparency, secure transport, schemas, public APIs, or downgrade behavior.
Write `None` only after checking each area.

## Release-gate impact

State whether this changes any item in `RELEASE-GATES.md` or claims in
`docs/IMPLEMENTATION-STATUS.md`.

## Reviewer notes

Call out risky files, generated content, follow-up work, or limitations.
